Variables.Name: DebugCameraControllerRef
Variables.Description: Debug camera - used to have independent camera without stopping gameplay

Variables.Name: DebugCameraControllerClass
Variables.Description: Debug camera - used to have independent camera without stopping gameplay

Functions.Name: FreezeFrame
Functions.Description: Pause the game for Delay seconds.

Functions.Name: Teleport
Functions.Description: Teleport to surface player is looking at.

Functions.Name: ChangeSize
Functions.Description: Scale the player's size to be F  default size.

Functions.Name: Fly
Functions.Description: Pawn can fly.

Functions.Name: Walk
Functions.Description: Return to walking movement mode from Fly or Ghost cheat.

Functions.Name: Ghost
Functions.Description: Pawn no longer collides with the world, and can fly

Functions.Name: God
Functions.Description: Invulnerability cheat.

Functions.Name: Slomo
Functions.Description: Modify time dilation to change apparent speed of passage of time. e.g. "Slomo 0.1" makes everything move very slowly, while "Slomo 10" makes everything move very fast.

Functions.Name: DamageTarget
Functions.Description: Damage the actor you're looking at (sourced from the player).

Functions.Name: DestroyTarget
Functions.Description: Destroy the actor you're looking at.

Functions.Name: DestroyAll
Functions.Description: Destroy all actors of class aClass

Functions.Name: DestroyAllPawnsExceptTarget
Functions.Description: Destroy all pawns except for the (pawn) target.  If no (pawn) target is found we don't destroy anything.

Functions.Name: DestroyPawns
Functions.Description: Destroys (by calling destroy directly) all non-player pawns of class aClass in the level

Functions.Name: Summon
Functions.Description: Load Classname and spawn an actor of that class

Functions.Name: PlayersOnly
Functions.Description: Freeze everything in the level except for players.

Functions.Name: ViewSelf
Functions.Description: Make controlled pawn the viewtarget again.

Functions.Name: ViewPlayer
Functions.Description: View from the point of view of player with PlayerName S.

Functions.Name: ViewActor
Functions.Description: View from the point of view of AActor with Name ActorName.

Functions.Name: ViewClass
Functions.Description: View from the point of view of an AActor of class DesiredClass.  Each subsequent ViewClass cycles through the list of actors of that class.

Functions.Name: StreamLevelIn
Functions.Description: Stream in the given level.

Functions.Name: OnlyLoadLevel
Functions.Description: Load the given level.

Functions.Name: StreamLevelOut
Functions.Description: Stream out the given level.

Functions.Name: ToggleDebugCamera
Functions.Description: Toggle between debug cameraplayer camera without locking gameplay and with locking local player controller input.

Functions.Name: ToggleAILogging
Functions.Description: toggles AI logging

Functions.Name: DebugCapsuleSweep
Functions.Description: Toggle capsule trace debugging. Will trace a capsule from current view point and show where it hits the world

Functions.Name: DebugCapsuleSweepSize
Functions.Description: Change Trace capsule size

Functions.Name: DebugCapsuleSweepChannel
Functions.Description: Change Trace Channel

Functions.Name: DebugCapsuleSweepComplex
Functions.Description: Change Trace Complex setting

Functions.Name: DebugCapsuleSweepCapture
Functions.Description: Capture current trace and add to persistent list

Functions.Name: DebugCapsuleSweepPawn
Functions.Description: Capture current local PC's pawn's location and add to persistent list

Functions.Name: DebugCapsuleSweepClear
Functions.Description: Clear persistent list for trace capture

Functions.Name: TestCollisionDistance
Functions.Description: Test all volumes in the world to the player controller's view location

Functions.Name: RebuildNavigation
Functions.Description: Builds the navigation mesh (or rebuilds it).

Functions.Name: SetNavDrawDistance
Functions.Description: Sets navigation drawing distance. Relevant only in non-editor modes.

Functions.Name: DumpOnlineSessionState
Functions.Description: Dump online session information

Functions.Name: DumpPartyState
Functions.Description: Dump known party information

Functions.Name: DumpChatState
Functions.Description: Dump known chat information

Functions.Name: DumpVoiceMutingState
Functions.Description: Dump current state of voice chat

Functions.Name: BugItGo
Functions.Description:
This will move the player and set their rotation to the passed in values.
	  We have this version of the BugIt family as it is easier to type in just raw numbers in the console.

Functions.Name: BugIt
Functions.Description:
This function is used to print out the BugIt location.  It prints out copy and paste versions for both IMing someone to type in
	 and also a gameinfo ?options version so that you can append it to your launching url and be taken to the correct place.
	 Additionally, it will take a screen shot so reporting bugs is a one command action!

Functions.Name: BugItStringCreator
Functions.Description: This will create a BugItGo string for us.  Nice for calling form c++ where you just want the string and no Screenshots

Functions.Name: FlushLog
Functions.Description: This will force a flush of the output log to file

Functions.Name: LogLoc
Functions.Description: Logs the current location in bugit format without taking screenshot and further routing.

Functions.Name: SetWorldOrigin
Functions.Description: Translate world origin to this player position

Functions.Name: SetMouseSensitivityToDefault
Functions.Description: Exec function to return the mouse sensitivity to its default value

Functions.Name: InvertMouse
Functions.Description: Backwards compatibility exec function for people used to it instead of using InvertAxisKey

Functions.Name: CheatScript
Functions.Description: Executes commands listed in CheatScript.ScriptName ini section of DefaultGame.ini

Functions.Name: ReceiveInitCheatManager
Functions.Description: BP implementable event for when CheatManager is created to allow any needed initialization.

Functions.Name: ReceiveEndPlay
Functions.Description: This is the End Play event for the CheatManager

Functions.Name: EnableDebugCamera
Functions.Description: Switch controller to debug camera without locking gameplay and with locking local player controller input

Functions.Name: DisableDebugCamera
Functions.Description: Switch controller from debug camera back to normal controller
